rulings.Case Title: BRIAN GERAGHTY VS. JOSEPH SHALIZI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Februaury 07, 2014, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Cross-Complaint is not barred by litigation privilege. See Navellier v Sletter (2003) 106 Cal.App.4th 763 and moving party failed to show how application of the privilege under the circumstances furthers public policy. 100 Park Lane Associates v. Feldman (2008) 160 Cal.App.4th 1467. A cause of action for breach of implied convenant may be pled. = (501/REQ)
